question: Show the name of the teacher for the math course.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID WHERE T2.Course  =  "Math"
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.col_2 FROM teacher AS T2 JOIN course_arrange AS T3 ON T2.col_1 = T3.col_2 JOIN course AS T1 ON T3.col_1 = T1.col_1 WHERE T1.col_2 = 'math'
raw_response: SELECT T2.col_2 FROM teacher AS T2 JOIN course_arrange AS T3 ON T2.col_1 = T3.col_2 JOIN course AS T1 ON T3.col_1 = T1.col_1 WHERE T1.col_2 = 'math'
